basic_details.job_title: Mizoram University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram University has released the official Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification on its official website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced under the Mizoram University (MZU) Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026. Candidates with an M.A. in Sociology and UGC-NET qualification are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 23 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

qualification.details: Guest Faculty: M.A. in Sociology from recognised University and UGC-NET qualifications (Mandatory).

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Mizoram University Guest Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Mizoram University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Overview
Mizoram University Guest Faculty Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Mizoram University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Mizoram University Guest Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Mizoram University Guest Faculty Vacancy Details 2026
Mizoram University Guest Faculty Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Guest Faculty: M.A. in Sociology from recognised University and UGC-NET qualifications (Mandatory).

content_sections.heading: Mizoram University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Mizoram University Guest Faculty Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Mizoram University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Mizoram University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the Mizoram University recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Mizoram University recruitment is Guest Faculty.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies available for the Guest Faculty position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What are the essential qualifications required for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.A. in Sociology from a recognized University and UGC-NET qualifications (Mandatory).

faq.question: Q5. What is the walk-in interview date for the Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted on 23 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is as per MZU Pay.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring all original certificates and mark-sheets from Class X onwards for verification, along with a set of photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Mizoram University, Aizawl.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Mizoram University?
faq.answer: The official website of Mizoram University is www.mzu.edu.in.
